signup.title: Create Account
signup.maxSubjects: You can add up to 4 subjects only!
signup.minPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

VerifyAccount.title: Account verification code
VerifyAccount.instruction: We have sent a verification code to your email. Please enter the code below to confirm your account.
VerifyAccount.msgResend: We have sent you a new code, check your email. You can resend the code after 5 minutes.
VerifyAccount.resendError: An error occurred while sending the code, please try again later.

login.title: Hello, Welcome back
login.pending: Your account is not approved yet
login.inValid: The password or email is incorrect!

forgotPass.title: Did you forget your password?
forgotPass.instruction: Don't worry! Just enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you instructions on how to reset your password.
forgotPass.inValid: The email address is invalid or has not yet been registered.

newPass.title: Reset your password
newPass.inValid: It must be at least 8 letters long.

header.search: Find material and create your lesson

homeStudent.welcomMsg: Let's start your learning journey today!
homeStudent.noData: There are no top-rated teachers yet!

footer.description: ORB is an educational platform that connects students with top-rated teachers and smart learning experiences.

createLessonForm.title: Create a new lesson
createLessonForm.subject: Study subject
createLessonForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Write the details of the lesson or topic that needs explaining. Example: Newton's Laws - Explanation and Problem Solving
createLessonForm.note: ⚠️ Your request will be sent immediately to the teachers currently available for the selected subject, and you will usually receive offers within 5 minutes.
createLessonForm.required: This fields must be filled in.
createLessonForm.titlePopUp: Your request has been successfully submitted!
createLessonForm.descriptionPopUp: Your lesson request has been published and teachers will start sending you their offers soon.

requestsLessonPage.title: Available Offers
requestsLessonPage.noOffers: No offers yet. Please wait a little while and offers will reach you soon. Or you can modify your request to increase your chances of receiving more offers.

ConfirmLesson.descriptionPopUpDone: Your feedback helps us improve the quality of our teachers.
